area.value: one creature plus one additional creature per four levels, no two of which can be more than 30 ft. apart

description.value: You instill courage in the subject, granting it a +4 morale bonus against fear effects for 10 minutes. If the subject is under the influence of a fear effect when receiving the spell, that effect is suppressed for the duration of the spell. Remove fear counters and dispels cause fear.
